reference_page.layout_type: Modal with EntityModal wrapper and status display via AdminModalTitle
patterns_noted: Status badges displayed in modal header via AdminModalTitle component
Read-only badge shown when editing not allowed
Status field uses InvoiceStatusField widget which renders StatusLine component
Action buttons (Approve, Allocate, Rollback, Cancel) grouped with d-flex and gap utilities

similar_patterns.description: Provision status UX pattern - Shows StatusLine with Draft/Provision states and action buttons (Provision, Rollback, Cancel)
StatusLine component - Renders visual status progression with circular indicators and connecting lines
Label/Badge component - Renders colored status badges with light/dark variants

components_needed.name: StatusLine
components_needed.purpose: Display credit note status progression (Draft → Approved with optional Cancelled state)

components_needed.name: Label
components_needed.purpose: Render status badges for Approved and Cancelled states

components_needed.name: ConfirmButton
components_needed.purpose: Action buttons for Rollback and Cancel operations with confirmation dialogs

components_needed.name: Button
components_needed.purpose: Standard action buttons for status changes

image_observations: Image 1 shows single 'APPROVED' status badge (red/pink color) positioned at top right of modal header
Image 2 shows two status badges: 'APPROVED' (yellow/gold) and 'CANCELLED' (red/pink) side by side at top right
Both images show badges as inline elements within the modal title/header area
Status badges appear to use Label component with different color variants
Badges are compact, pill-shaped elements with text centered inside
